findInText.text: The morning sun was shining brightly, casting long shadows across the rolling hills. Birds were singing their melodious songs while children were playing in the sprawling gardens. A gentle breeze was blowing through the swaying trees, carrying the scent of blooming flowers. People were walking along the winding paths, enjoying the refreshing air and the stunning views of the surrounding countryside. Everything was moving in perfect harmony.
